# podfly

> Deploy Serverpod on existing cloud infrastructure via each provider’s CLI.
> Not a host — orchestrates fly, railway, wrangler, vercel, netlify, gh, neonctl,
> etc., and encodes config quirks.

## Start here

- [README](README.md) — mission, provider table, install from pub.dev, quick start
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — agent rules and decision tree
- [doc/guide.md](doc/guide.md) — commands, flags, automation, troubleshooting
- [doc/ci.md](doc/ci.md) — GitHub Actions / CI tokens and workflows
- [doc/podfly.yaml.md](doc/podfly.yaml.md) — full config reference

## Core docs

- [doc/caching.md](doc/caching.md) — Flutter web WASM, service worker, Cache-Control
- [doc/database.md](doc/database.md) — none / sqlite / fly_postgres / railway_postgres / neon
- [doc/README.md](doc/README.md) — docs index
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) — releases
- [doc/specs/](doc/specs/) — design history

## Host notes (API)

- [doc/aws.md](doc/aws.md) — App Runner (no WS) vs ECS+ALB (WS OK)
- [doc/azure.md](doc/azure.md) — Container Apps
- [doc/hetzner.md](doc/hetzner.md) — VPS + Docker/SSH + Caddy HTTPS

## Static web CDN notes (`web_host`)

Flutter **static only** — not Serverpod API or WebSockets. API stays on `host:`.

- [doc/netlify.md](doc/netlify.md) — `web_host: netlify`
- [doc/github_pages.md](doc/github_pages.md) — `web_host: github_pages`
- [doc/upstash.md](doc/upstash.md) — `redis.provider: upstash` (cache/PubSub; multi-machine proof + teardown)
- [doc/supabase.md](doc/supabase.md) — `database.provider: supabase` (managed Postgres)
- Also: `web_host: cloudflare` (default, `wrangler`), `web_host: vercel`

## Examples

External monorepo: https://github.com/127thousand/podfly_examples

| Path | API | UI | Streams |
|------|-----|-----|---------|
| `fly/api_only` | Fly | — | — |
| `vercel/split_fly` | Fly | Vercel | — |
| `vercel/realtime_split` | Fly | Vercel | ✅ WS → Fly |
| `netlify/split_fly` | Fly | Netlify | — |
| `netlify/realtime_split` | Fly | Netlify | ✅ WS → Fly |
| `github_pages/split_fly` | Fly | GitHub Pages | — |
| `github_pages/realtime_split` | Fly | GitHub Pages | ✅ WS → Fly |
| `upstash/pubsub_chat` | Fly HA + Upstash Redis | Netlify | ✅ WS + cross-machine PubSub |
| `hetzner/*`, `azure/*`, `aws/ecs_realtime`, … | see repo README |

Package pointer: [`example/mobile_api_only`](example/mobile_api_only) (Fly API-only).

## Default commands (copy-paste)

```bash
# Install (pub.dev)
dart pub global activate podfly

# After serverpod create (or in existing Serverpod monorepo)
podfly deploy --yes --smoke

# Plan only
podfly deploy --yes --dry-run --no-login

# API only (mobile clients)
podfly deploy --api --yes --smoke

# Railway
podfly deploy --host railway --api --yes --smoke

# Split: Fly API + static Flutter on Netlify / Vercel / GitHub Pages
# (set web_host + block in podfly.yaml — see doc/podfly.yaml.md)

# Checks
podfly doctor
podfly smoke
```

## Supported today

| Layer | Providers |
|-------|-----------|
| API **deploy** | Fly, Railway, DigitalOcean, Render, Cloud Run, AWS App Runner, AWS ECS+ALB, Azure Container Apps, Hetzner Cloud |
| API **host choice** | `host: fly \| railway \| digitalocean \| render \| cloud_run \| aws \| aws_ecs \| azure \| hetzner` |
| Static UI (`web_host`, `mode: split`) | **cloudflare** (default), **vercel**, **netlify**, **github_pages** |
| UI (native with API host) | Railway static nginx; DO separate web app; Cloud Run / App Runner / Azure / Hetzner monolith nginx |
| DB | none, sqlite, fly_postgres, railway_postgres, digitalocean_postgres, render_postgres, neon |
| Redis (optional) | **upstash** (`redis.provider: upstash`) — multi-instance cache/PubSub |

### Realtime / WebSockets

| Host | Streams? |
|------|----------|
| Fly, Railway, DO, Render, Cloud Run, Azure ACA, Hetzner, **aws_ecs** | ✅ |
| **aws** (App Runner) | ❌ Envoy 403 on Upgrade — use `aws_ecs` |
| Static CDNs (Pages / Vercel / Netlify / GitHub Pages) | ❌ UI only — point `SERVER_URL` at API host |

Split realtime pattern: Flutter on CDN, Serverpod on API host; bake `SERVER_URL` to API;
do **not** fall back to same-origin when the page is on `*.vercel.app` / `*.netlify.app` / `*.github.io`.

**App Runner (`host: aws`):** HTTP RPC + optional Flutter monolith. **No WebSockets.**  
**ECS+ALB (`host: aws_ecs`):** Fargate + ALB — **WebSockets work**. See `doc/aws.md`.

## Hard rules for agents

1. Prefer Serverpod’s `*_server/Dockerfile` — do not invent Python or random images.
2. Build Flutter web inside the Flutter package (podfly does this).
3. Template Serverpod auth ≠ needs Postgres (soft warning only).
4. No `web/` + android/ios → API-only (`web.enabled: false`).
5. Podfly auto-creates Fly apps and sanitizes names (`_` → `-`). Railway: project + service + domain + `railway up`.
6. **Do not require Fly CLI** when `host:` is railway/render/etc. — only that host’s CLI.
7. Deploy implemented for fly, railway, digitalocean, render, cloud_run, aws, aws_ecs, azure, hetzner.
8. Static web: `web_host: cloudflare|vercel|netlify|github_pages` + matching CLI (`wrangler` / `vercel` / `netlify` / `gh`+`git`).
9. Fly Postgres: ensure API app **before** attach; use attach `DATABASE_URL` (sidecar), not superuser placeholders.
10. GitHub Pages project sites need `base_href: /<repo>/` (podfly auto-sets when left as `/`).

## Package

- Binary: `podfly`
- pub.dev: https://pub.dev/packages/podfly
- Repo: https://github.com/127thousand/podfly
- Examples: https://github.com/127thousand/podfly_examples
- Skill: `.grok/skills/podfly/SKILL.md` (or user install of same)
